brief.audience: Existing UK customers (28-45) concerned about consumption

matchedFragments.reason: Partial semantic match; strong keyword overlap; brand: premium-tone; fresh content
Partial semantic match; strong keyword overlap; brand: sustainability-voice
Partial semantic match; strong keyword overlap; brand: premium-tone+sustainability-voice; fresh content

gaps.description: While there are fragments dedicated to spring campaigns and capsule concepts, none cohesively combine the 'capsule' structure with both the premium tone and sustainable voice required by the brand guidelines.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "spring capsule collection", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

gaps.description: The candidates cover general sustainable fibres and origin integrity, but none specifically address the sourcing details or focus on cotton required by this topic.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "sustainable cotton sourcing", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

gaps.description: Fragments cover transitional seasonality and styling concepts, but the necessary blend of Premium Tone AND Sustainability Voice across a W/S transition in one document is not consistently present.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "winter to spring styling", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

gaps.description: Specific maintenance guides exist for various items (footwear, hats, stains), but a holistic garment 'Care Guide' that aligns with the audience's concern for consumption through both required voices is missing.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb care-guide fragment covering "care guide", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

draftOutline.title: Spring Rewear 2027: A Sustainable Journey Through Transition

sections.heading: The Glorious Awakening: Celebrating the Arrival of Spring
sections.rationale: Establishes the seasonal transition and premium, celebratory tone suitable for introducing a luxury lifestyle narrative.

sections.heading: The Spring Capsule Collection: Pieces for the Modern Wardrobe
sections.rationale: Addresses the core product offering by providing a cohesively toned and volume-appropriate story on the new capsule pieces.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "spring capsule collection", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

sections.heading: Our Commitment: Sustainable Cotton Sourcing and Integrity
sections.rationale: Dedicated focus on the specific raw material required by this audience, linking quality to ethical origins.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "sustainable cotton sourcing", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

sections.heading: Beyond the Season: Winter to Spring Styling Versatility
sections.rationale: Provides actionable advice on maximizing wardrobe investment, crucial for the consumption-aware audience.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "winter to spring styling", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.

sections.heading: Caring for Your Investment: A Guide to Longevity
sections.rationale: Offers necessary practical information that aligns with the audience's mindful consumption habits and enhances product value.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word en-gb care-guide fragment covering "care guide", applying sustainability-voice and premium-tone.
